intro:
Farm. Decorate. Befriend. Belong.
A heartwarming life sim where you build a peaceful 
valley, raise adorable animals, and find your forever home.
description:
Cozy Valley Life invites you into a vibrant, 
anime-inspired world where every day brings a new 
adventure. Customize your character, decorate your 
home, grow crops, raise animals, fish under starlit 
skies, and befriend quirky villagers across four 
beautiful seasons.

Build the home you've always wanted. Make friends 
who feel like family. Celebrate festivals, discover 
hidden secrets, and shape a peaceful valley that 
grows alongside you.

Whether you're farming, foraging, fishing, or 
falling in love — Cozy Valley Life is your perfect 
place to slow down and stay a while.
